caption: A weathered Nordic-red timber outbuilding stands at the edge of a beech and birch forest, its walls fresh-milled and pale where recently repaired. Moss-covered glacial boulders are scattered among the trees. A small flock of free-range chickens forages in the woodland litter nearby, and beyond a wooden forest-edge fence a few Hereford cattle graze a shaded pasture. No signage, license plates, or road markings are visible anywhere in frame. Warm, diffuse light suggests a temperate summer afternoon.

architecture.colour: nordic red timber (falu red), fresh-milled pale timber repair patch
architecture.condition: weathered, recently repaired with fresh-milled boards

confidence_notes: No EXIF GPS, no signage/plates/road markings in frame; scene_type=canopy_interior (forest interior) so cross-view (C1) and pose (D) are expected to be skipped-with-reason by the router -- only rule-based geo-prior (B) and OSM structured retrieval (C2) apply. Terrain/skyline (C3) has no usable cue (flat forest floor, no horizon) and should degrade to a no-op.
